subject: fix(pwa): bypass SW navigation cache for embed URLs
body:
The service worker precaches index.html with response headers from when
it was installed. If installed before the X-Frame-Options removal, the
cached response still included the old SAMEORIGIN header — blocking
cross-origin iframes. Since the iframe blocks before JS runs, the SW
update code never executes, creating a deadlock.

Added navigateFallbackDenylist for ?embed= URLs so they always bypass
the SW cache and go directly to the network (Vercel).

Tags: pwa, embed, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: embedding
Semver: patch
